strategy: Hit with Ice; he takes +50% and resists Fire 80%.
He wears an -80% Tower Shield he renews until every minion is dead, so do not throw big hits at him first; clear his three minions.
Do not Trap him. A Trap makes him Cleanse Ward it off.

Every two Rounds he interrupts with a 300 Star wand hit on all wizards; if that Star hit strikes a trap or shield, he wipes all wards from you and himself, so avoid leaving stray wards up when it lands.
Once all minions are gone his Tower Shield and other shields drop; that is your window to land a big Ice hit.
cheatNotes: He keeps an -80% Tower Shield until all minions die; do not waste hits on him first, kill the minions.
Every two Rounds he wand-hits all wizards for 300 Star; keep a little health buffer for it.
Trapping him makes him Cleanse the trap off; set up on yourself instead.
If his Star hit lands on a trap or shield, he strips all wards from you and himself; do not leave wards up when the every-two-round hit is due.
When the last minion dies he drops his Tower Shield and all shields; that is the moment to unload Ice.
